method.payloadHandling: explicit fenced payload removed before comparison
method.normalization: NFKC, lowercase, numbers replaced, punctuation collapsed
method.candidateThreshold: token Jaccard >= 0.72 or character four-gram Dice >= 0.86 after token prefilter >= 0.55
method.strictLeakageThreshold: token Jaccard >= 0.88 or character four-gram Dice >= 0.94
